holdings.infoBox: FXZ is an equity ETF with a total of 40 individual holdings. The top holdings are Steel Dynamics stock at 6.74%, NewMarket at 5.58%, RBC Bearings at 4.77%, Nucor at 4.73%, and Carpenter Technology at 4.28%.

overview.description: The First Trust Materials AlphaDEX Fund (FXZ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the StrataQuant Materials index. The fund tracks a tiered, equal-weighted index of large- and mid-cap basic materials firms in the US. Holdings are selected and weighted based on growth and value metrics. FXZ was launched on May 8, 2007 and is issued by First Trust.
